privileged_info_summary: This task configures Microsoft Edge for a construction field workstation. All metadata claims are verified: directories are /home/ga/Documents/FieldData and /home/ga/Desktop/field_config_summary.txt; target and startup URLs point to real U.S. government websites (OSHA and National Weather Service); home URL is https://www.weather.gov; bookmark folder is named 'Field Resources'. Data sources are real, publicly accessible government pages (OSHA.gov for construction and fall protection safety information; weather.gov for weather safety), not synthetic.
